text.title: MCP Development Prompts — Server, Debug, Architecture, Testing — Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules every application of `mcp-dev-prompts` must enforce. Verifiable at review time; failures gate the artifact.

rule.statement: Every prompt carries an id + semver version; references resolve by id@version.
rule.rationale: Floating prompt references break reproducibility; version pinning is auditable.

rule.statement: Every prompt declares expected input shape (sections) + expected output shape (schema / fields).
rule.rationale: Without I/O shape, prompt outputs are unparseable.

rule.statement: Every prompt declares the recommended model (haiku/sonnet/opus); overrides logged.
rule.rationale: Mis-matched model gives bad results; capture rationale for any override.

rule.statement: Every prompt documents ≥1 known failure mode + how to detect.
rule.rationale: Without failure-mode docs, repeat regressions cost cycles.

rule.statement: Prompts have a per-prompt CHANGELOG; bumps require rationale.
rule.rationale: Prompt bumps without rationale yield unauditable behaviour changes.

rule.statement: Every prompt has ≥1 fixture run in CI; CI fails when output diverges from golden.
rule.rationale: Untested prompts drift silently as the LLM provider changes models.
